Operation 'getCampaigns' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks details about what campaign data is returned and authentication requirements. Added specifics about return structure and authentication to improve AI agent understanding of available data and prerequisites.

data.current_description: Retrieves a list of campaigns created in Landrr.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all campaigns created in Landrr for the authenticated user. Returns campaign objects containing campaign ID, name, status, and creation details. Requires API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about what campaign data is returned and authentication requirements. Added specifics about return structure and authentication to improve AI agent understanding of available data and prerequisites.

message: Operation 'getLeads' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is vague about what constitutes a lead and what data is returned. Added context about lead structure, authentication requirement, and domain context about how leads are generated through chatbots to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Retrieves leads from campaigns in Landrr.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of leads generated from campaigns in Landrr. Returns lead objects containing lead ID, contact information, associated campaign, and lead status. Requires API key authentication. Leads are typically contacts captured through campaign chatbots.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about what constitutes a lead and what data is returned. Added context about lead structure, authentication requirement, and domain context about how leads are generated through chatbots to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'zapierSubscribe' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Zap Subscribe' is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what subscription accomplishes, what inputs are required, what is returned, and side effects. Improved summary clarifies the webhook subscription purpose, and description now includes input requirements, return value, and side effects for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Subscribe API executed from the Zapier platform the first time a user publishes a Zap.
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook subscription with Landrr to receive event notifications from the Zapier platform. Executed when a user publishes a Zap for the first time. Accepts subscription details including webhook URL and event types. Returns subscription confirmation with subscription ID and status. Creates a persistent webhook connection for event delivery.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Zap Subscribe' is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what subscription accomplishes, what inputs are required, what is returned, and side effects. Improved summary clarifies the webhook subscription purpose, and description now includes input requirements, return value, and side effects for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'zapierUnsubscribe' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what unsubscription accomplishes, required inputs (subscription ID), return value, and side effects. Improved summary clarifies the webhook unsubscription purpose, and description now includes input requirements, return value, and side effects for better AI agent understanding of the operation's impact.

data.current_description: Unsubscribe API executed when a Zap is disabled.
data.description_suggestion: Removes a webhook subscription from Landrr to stop receiving event notifications. Executed when a Zap is disabled or deleted. Requires the subscription ID to identify which webhook to remove. Returns confirmation of successful unsubscription. Terminates the persistent webhook connection and stops all event delivery.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what unsubscription accomplishes, required inputs (subscription ID), return value, and side effects. Improved summary clarifies the webhook unsubscription purpose, and description now includes input requirements, return value, and side effects for better AI agent understanding of the operation's impact.
